name: firefox-github-html-viewer
description: Firefox extension that adds a Preview button to GitHub HTML blob pages.

scripts.prepare-build: npm run clean && tsc && cp -R public/. build/
scripts.start: npm run prepare-build && concurrently -k -n tsc,run -c blue,green "tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "web-ext run"
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
